package com.chinatower.base;

import org.springframework.boot.ApplicationArguments;
import org.springframework.boot.ApplicationRunner;
import org.springframework.boot.SpringApplication;
import org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.SpringBootApplication;
import org.springframework.cloud.client.discovery.EnableDiscoveryClient;
import org.springframework.cloud.openfeign.EnableFeignClients;

  @EnableDiscoveryClient
  @EnableFeignClients
  @SpringBootApplication
public class BaseDemoApplication implements ApplicationRunner {
    public BaseDemoApplication() {
    }
    public static void main(String[] p0) {
        BaseDemoApplication.q();
        SpringApplication.run(BaseDemoApplication.class, p0);
    }
    private static void q() {
        String p0 = "111";
        p0.getBytes();
    }
    private static void test() {
    }
    public void run(ApplicationArguments p0) throws Exception {
        System.out.println("project started ...");
    }
}
